cognition.rationale: I declare six of the eight findings from the v1.0.0 critical audit closed through the coordinated release sequence: v1.1.0 (immutability correctness via event sourcing, metrics formalization for DPI/CFR/LV, policy_hash canonicalization via RFC 8785 JCS, SemVer consistency), v2.0.0 (domain-decoupled Core + Profile architecture, ODS-Finance/v1 authored, six profiles reserved), and v2.1.0 (Merkle tree specification via RFC 6962 with store-assigned sequence_number ordering, CHECKPOINT record_type, Standard-level log tamper evidence). Each release was published publicly on GitHub. v1.0 was deprecated publicly within seventy-two hours of the immutability finding. v2.0 records remain valid; the Merkle log begins with v2.1.0 records, an explicit genesis boundary. The two remaining findings (#7 Technical Committee with real names; #8 multi-stakeholder governance addressing the judge-and-party problem) are not specification problems — they require community work and are tracked separately under the outreach program. I consider the technical audit closed as of this declaration.

counterfactuals.alternative_action: Declare findings closed but qualified as 'self-declared, pending external verification'
Defer the declaration until at least one independent implementation exists
